parameters.content:
## RAG Evaluation Workflow — NDCG@3 Benchmark

**Pipeline:** Load Test Cases → Split In Batches → PGVector Query (top 5) → Compute NDCG@3 → LLM Judge → Merge Scores → Collect → Export

**Metrics:**
- **NDCG@3:** Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (graded relevance 0-3)
- **Hit Rate:** Was any highly-relevant chunk (grade ≥ 2) in top 5?
- **Context Relevance:** LLM-as-a-Judge binary score (1=Yes, 0=No)

**Test Cases:** 21 scenarios across 5 policy sections + cross-section queries
**Vector Store:** PGVector `policy_chunks` table (18 sub-section chunks)
**Embeddings:** Ollama mxbai-embed-large (with query prefix)
**Judge LLM:** Groq llama-4-scout
**Query Prefix:** Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:

parameters.jsCode:
// 18 sub-section chunks: chunk_1_1 through chunk_5_3
// Each maps to a specific sub-section of university_policies.txt
const testCases = [
  {test_id:1, section:'Registration', difficulty:'easy', question:'What is the maximum credit hours for a student with a 2.10 GPA?', ground_truth:'14 credit hours per semester. Students with GPA between 2.00 and 2.15 are on Academic Warning and restricted to 14 credit hours.', ideal_grades:{chunk_1_1:1, chunk_1_2:0, chunk_1_3:3, chunk_1_4:1, chunk_1_5:1}},
  {test_id:2, section:'Registration', difficulty:'easy', question:'What is the minimum credit hours required for full-time enrollment status?', ground_truth:'A minimum of 9 credit hours per regular semester (Fall and Spring).', ideal_grades:{chunk_1_1:3}},
  {test_id:3, section:'Registration', difficulty:'medium', question:'If no specific GPA-band constraint is triggered, what is the default maximum credit limit?', ground_truth:'The system enforces a hard default maximum of 18 credit hours per semester.', ideal_grades:{chunk_1_5:3, chunk_1_2:1}},
  {test_id:4, section:'Prerequisites', difficulty:'easy', question:'Can a student register for a course if they received an F in the prerequisite?', ground_truth:'No. An F or FW in a prerequisite means the condition has not been met and registration is prohibited.', ideal_grades:{chunk_2_1:3, chunk_2_2:1}},
  {test_id:5, section:'Prerequisites', difficulty:'easy', question:'What does the AND prerequisite condition mean?', ground_truth:'AND means all courses in a set must be passed to satisfy the prerequisite.', ideal_grades:{chunk_2_2:3}},
  {test_id:6, section:'Prerequisites', difficulty:'medium', question:'What happens if more than 30 students fail a critical prerequisite course in one semester?', ground_truth:'The Faculty Administration automatically forces that course to be offered in the immediately following term.', ideal_grades:{chunk_2_4:3, chunk_2_1:1}},
  {test_id:7, section:'Prerequisites', difficulty:'easy', question:'Can a student who failed a course register for it from another program?', ground_truth:'Yes. Students are legally allowed to register for cross-program offerings of previously failed courses.', ideal_grades:{chunk_2_5:3, chunk_2_1:1}},
  {test_id:8, section:'Grading', difficulty:'easy', question:'Which letter grades are considered passing and earn academic credit?', ground_truth:'Grades A, B, C, and D are passing. F indicates failure with zero credit hours.', ideal_grades:{chunk_3_1:3, chunk_3_2:1}},
  {test_id:9, section:'Grading', difficulty:'easy', question:'What happens if a student misses more than 25% of contact hours?', ground_truth:'The student is barred from the final exam and awarded an FW grade with the same GPA penalty as F.', ideal_grades:{chunk_3_4:3, chunk_3_3:1}},
  {test_id:10, section:'Grading', difficulty:'medium', question:'Does a W (Withdrawal) grade satisfy course prerequisites?', ground_truth:'No. W is a non-passing grade that does not satisfy prerequisites or earn credit.', ideal_grades:{chunk_3_2:3, chunk_2_1:1}},
  {test_id:11, section:'Graduation', difficulty:'easy', question:'What minimum GPA is required for graduation?', ground_truth:'A final Cumulative GPA of no less than 2.00.', ideal_grades:{chunk_4_2:3, chunk_4_1:1}},
  {test_id:12, section:'Graduation', difficulty:'easy', question:'What must be completed before registering for the Graduation Project?', ground_truth:'The mandatory Summer Field Training (Field Training 1 and 2).', ideal_grades:{chunk_4_3:3}},
  {test_id:13, section:'Graduation', difficulty:'easy', question:'What are the requirements to graduate with a BS degree?', ground_truth:'Pass all core courses, university requirements, and elective groups per the study plan with minimum 2.00 GPA.', ideal_grades:{chunk_4_1:3, chunk_4_2:2}},
  {test_id:14, section:'Scheduling', difficulty:'easy', question:'Can online courses be scheduled at the same time as fixed-time classes?', ground_truth:'Yes. Conflict detection does not apply to online courses or TBD time slots.', ideal_grades:{chunk_5_2:3, chunk_5_1:1}},
  {test_id:15, section:'Scheduling', difficulty:'easy', question:'How are University Requirement courses delivered and scheduled?', ground_truth:'Via online format, assigned to Thursdays with flexible TBD time slots.', ideal_grades:{chunk_5_3:3}},
  {test_id:16, section:'Scheduling', difficulty:'easy', question:'What rule prevents students from registering for conflicting courses?', ground_truth:'Students cannot register for courses sharing the exact same schedule day and time period.', ideal_grades:{chunk_5_1:3}},
  {test_id:17, section:'Cross-Section', difficulty:'medium', question:'What is the difference between academic warning and academic probation?', ground_truth:'Warning is GPA 2.00-2.15 with 14 credit hour limit. Probation is GPA below 2.00 with 12 credit hour limit.', ideal_grades:{chunk_1_3:3, chunk_1_4:3}},
  {test_id:18, section:'Cross-Section', difficulty:'hard', question:'What grade penalties exist for poor attendance versus course failure?', ground_truth:'Attendance >25% absence gives FW. Direct failure gives F. Both carry zero credit hours and same GPA penalty.', ideal_grades:{chunk_3_4:3, chunk_3_1:2}},
  {test_id:19, section:'Cross-Section', difficulty:'medium', question:'List all non-passing grades recognized by the grading system.', ground_truth:'F (Failure), FW (Fail due to Withdrawal/Absence), W (Withdrawal), and U (Unsatisfactory).', ideal_grades:{chunk_3_2:3, chunk_3_1:2, chunk_3_4:1}},
  {test_id:20, section:'Cross-Section', difficulty:'hard', question:'If a student on academic probation fails a prerequisite course, what options do they have?', ground_truth:'Limited to 12 credit hours, can register for cross-program offerings of the failed course. If 30+ students also failed, the course may be force-offered next term.', ideal_grades:{chunk_1_4:3, chunk_2_5:3, chunk_2_4:2, chunk_2_1:1}},
  {test_id:21, section:'Cross-Section', difficulty:'hard', question:'Describe the complete academic lifecycle from enrollment through graduation.', ground_truth:'Maintain 9+ credit hours for full-time, pass prerequisites (A/B/C/D), complete core courses and electives, finish field training, achieve minimum 2.00 GPA.', ideal_grades:{chunk_1_1:2, chunk_2_1:2, chunk_4_1:3, chunk_4_3:1}}
];
return testCases.map(tc => ({json: tc}));
